root.sql: select sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no, ((select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code) ||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname)as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no||' : '|| (select member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ))as member_group_name, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_qty, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve, sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt, sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_mem_m_share_mem.begin_balance, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_coll_amount, sc_mem_m_share_mem.keep_from_deposit, sc_mem_m_share_mem.deposit_account_no, sc_mem_m_share_mem.amount_from_deposit from sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = '000102' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '016008' and '016008' --and sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status = '0'

r_ktm_share_del_det_nest.sql: select sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.doc_no , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type , (select sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type_description from sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type where item_type = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type) as item_type_description, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.period , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_amount , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.cancel_status , (select sign_flag from sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type where item_type = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type) as sign_flag from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = {0} --sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = '000102' /*WHERE*/ order by operate_date,seq_no
